events.message: A train is waiting at each platform.
The fire alarm is sounding throughout the station. You cannot see any evidence of a fire.

[PA system] To all passengers. There is a suspected fire on the North/South escalators between the concourse and Platforms 1 and 2. Passengers on all platforms should board the first available train. Passengers at concourse level should leave by the nearest exit. Do not use the lift.
The train doors have closed and the train has departed. If you are still on the platform, please use the escalators to leave.
